title: The Lightworkers
summary: The named class of incarnated agents — targeted for elimination in the dark-timeline warnings, first in line for the funds in the bright ones.
markdown:
**The Lightworkers** are a named population in the record's drama — incarnated agents of
the light, always listed alongside the [Starseeds](/lore/starseed-psyop/) — and their
fortunes track exactly which timeline a session is describing.

In the dark-timeline warnings of spring 2020 they are targets: *"Starseeds and
Lightworker beings will be eliminated. Only those conforming to the Directive..."* — and,
in the [Hawk You session's](/lore/hawk-you/) grimmest line, *"All starseed lightworkers
will be assimilated. Freewill will be terminated."* In the bright-timeline material they
are payees: the December 2023 [NESARA](/lore/nesara-gesara/) session orders that the
*"fund must be released to all starseed light worker and supersoldier operative."*

The same class, slated for elimination in one branch and back-pay in another, is the
record's [timeline doctrine](/lore/positive-timeline/) made personal: who the
lightworkers are never changes — only which future gets them.
